name: corl-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for CoRL, the Conference on Robot Learning: venue routing at the ML/robotics intersection, OpenReview submission, the one-page PDF rebuttal, first-round rejection triage, learning-grade experiments (seeds, episodes, sim-to-real), supplementary video evidence, and the PMLR camera-ready. Grounded in official corl.org 2026 pages, OpenReview, and PMLR volumes checked on 2026-07-08.
